programme.title: Tuesday Report : Crossing Paths Anew - EP 2 / 星期二特写 从新遇见
programme.desc: Rattan furniture and black-and-gold signboards were once popular choices for new homes or shop openings, shaping a generation of skilled craftsmen. But as choices become more diverse, these traditional crafts are declining. What challenges do they face today? Surprisingly, young artisans still choose to remain in these sunset industries. How are they carving out new paths for these fading crafts?

programme.title: Golden City - EP 551 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. programme.title: (Live) Hello Singapore - EP 56 / 狮城有约
programme.desc: Delivering the day's latest news and social features that matter to you. Every Monday to Friday, from 6.30pm to 7.30pm on Channel 8.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 1 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Situ Jiu's trusted assistant, Zhang Tie, joins Cheng Lang and Cheng Qing for a meal at the Situ family home. During the gathering, Situ Jiu unexpectedly proposes that Cheng Lang resign from his job and take over Da Long Feng.

programme.title: Love In A Pot - EP 3 / 围炉开吃
programme.desc: Yunnan’s taste universe is full of surprises: fresh fish only, wild mushrooms at your own risk, fruits as broth, stones as pots, and straw hats as lids. Lyu Linxuan is joined by radio DJs Zhong Kun Hua and Evelyn Tan for a hotpot feast. Will their meal turn into lively chaos, or reveal sides of themselves never seen before?

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 18 / 金式森林
programme.desc: Lin Cheng confides in Huanqiu about Yangtian’s illness and brings his medical report to consult a traditional Chinese physician. Jiaxin secretly informs Xueqin, who then appears at the clinic and snatches the medical report.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻

programme.title: Hong Kong Chef’s Culinary Adventures - EP 20 / 他乡的煮人
programme.desc: Hong Kong has many talented chefs who combine Cantonese and Western cooking. This special "Hong Kong flavour" is famous worldwide. In countries like Canada, Australia, the UK, and Japan, people can discover Hong Kong chefs living and cooking locally.

programme.title: Swords into Plowshares - EP 36 / 太平年
programme.desc: The narrative follows three young heroes — Zhao Kuangyin, Qian Hongchu, and Guo Rong — who navigate the chaos of war to unite rival states. Their journey of friendship, sacrifice, and the quest for peace offers a rich, emotionally engaging experience for viewers.

programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 1 / 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: Women Behind Bars - EP 2 / 女子监狱
programme.desc: Taoyuan Women's Prison is among the three women's prisons in Taiwan. Having one of the lowest crime rates in the world, Taiwan still harbors nearly 4,000 women inmates in 2024. What leads them to be incarcerated behind bars? Are they subject to invisible social difficulties? Does optimal governance exist between tolerance and punishment?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and "mysteriously" appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this f

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: Yia travels to Texas to hunt arguably the tastiest of all deer. Native to India, the Axis deer were introduced in Texas in 1932 as a prized game meat for ranchers. The Texas hill country turned out to be the perfect habitat for Axis deer, who quickly escaped their high fence ranches, establishing a healthy wild breeding population. Now with over 150,000 Axis deer roaming the hill country, these de

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Rob Brydon
programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won't forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm

programme.title: Sex and the City
programme.desc: After Carrie and Big decide to get married, Big becomes nervous on their wedding day when Miranda, his lover's friend, tells him about the reality of marriage out of frustration.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg Focker, a hapless American nurse, ends up like a hamster on a wheel of misadventures in a desperate attempt to win the favour of his girlfriend's parents.

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it from him.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar, a fast-talking fish, becomes an overnight sensation when he lies about having killed a shark. However, he soon begins to suffer the consequences of his deceptive actions.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Various couples strive to overcome challenges in their personal lives, as they face highs and lows in their romantic relationships.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: After several failed blind dates, a woman finally finds the man of her dreams, but his mother goes to great lengths to ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: John Clark, a lawyer, finds his marriage losing its spark. In an attempt to find a new passion for himself, he enrols in a dance studio where Paulina catches his eye.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: New-York based lawyers Audrey and Daniel, who often compete against each other, get married. However, they find it difficult to learn to draw lines between their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Aanandham
programme.desc: Thirupathisamy raises his three brothers with love and care, but family tensions rise when Madhavan's wife begins to rebel, threatening their unity. Starring Mammootty, Murali, Abbas, Devayani & many more

programme.desc: A possessive, suspicious wife is in constant fear of other women in her husband's life. When she is diagnosed with a terminal heart condition, she plans to settle down her husband with another woman.

programme.desc: Saravanan falls for Meera at first sight, but she eventually turns him down. When he learns about her upcoming marriage, he and his friend, Partha, set out to Pondicherry to stop the wedding.

programme.title: Bittersweet Destiny Ep193
programme.desc: An accident leads to the murder of legendary chef Wanli, the disappearance of his daughter & the separation of his 4 disciples. Years later, a forgotten secret unravels the mystery behind everything.

programme.title: Our Town, Her Time Ep07
programme.desc: A-Song, heir to a four-generation papercraft tradition, rediscovers purpose after meeting gifted apprentice A-Nuan, as love and creativity reshape their future together.

programme.title: Way Back Home Ep14
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Taiwanese actress Gail Lin, who struggled to find her place in life. After attending three funerals, she transformed from grief to acceptance, ultimately changing her life.

programme.title: The Mother Of The Tofu Family Ep97
programme.desc: A heartwarming tale of a mother leading her family to overcome challenges and protect the clash between tradition and new ideas, while also showcasing the resilience of modern women.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 21
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 27
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 99-100
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 10
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 87
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 32
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 61
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 1
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.desc: Our Cantik Detektif - Huda Ali - returns with a newfound determination to uncover the world's beauty secrets. programme.title: Saat Aku Tahu (The Moment I Knew It) - EP 12

programme.title: Selamat Hari Tak Jadi
programme.desc: A group of mischievous college students led by Hani, uses recording of prank victims to gain fame and popularity through their social media platform. But everything suddenly changes when the college decides to suspend Hani after finding out one of the prank victims, Puteri, had attempted to commit suicide when her embarrassing prank video was released online. Now, her gang agree to demote Hani.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Janin Emas (Ko-Mun-Thong)

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan
programme.desc: A mother finally passes away after suffering for three years from an unknown disease. With his wife gone, the father leaves the children to go work out of town.
